name: Qwen3-Max
archDisplay: MoE, exact expert configuration undisclosed (>1T total params)
note: Alibaba's biggest model yet, over 1T params (exact undisclosed) trained on 36T tokens; API-only preview.

results.notes: Tau2-Bench, surpassing Claude Opus 4 and DeepSeek V3.1

SuperGPQA, Qwen3-Max-Instruct (Preview) official launch chart (same felloai transcription as the AIME/Arena-Hard rows; chart also shows Qwen3-235B 62.6, Kimi K2 57.2, Claude Opus 4 56.5). llm-stats lists the GA release at 65.1. Corrects a prior 81.4 (dev.to) that misread the AIME bar (GA AIME transcriptions cite 81.6).

AIME 2025, Qwen3-Max-Instruct (Preview, non-thinking), official launch chart (also transcribed by localllm.in). Some GA-release transcriptions cite 81.6; Thinking variant later reported 100 with tools + test-time compute.
Arena-Hard v2, Qwen3-Max-Instruct (Preview), official launch chart (also transcribed by localllm.in).
LiveCodeBench v6, Qwen3-Max-Instruct (Preview) launch chart. Conflicting GA-era transcriptions cite 74.8 (e.g. apidog); no official text source resolves it.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: preview announced Sept 5, 2025 (X/Alibaba_Qwen, MarkTechPost, Cybernews, Interesting Engineering all corroborate), over 1T total params (undisclosed exact figure) trained on 36T tokens, MoE architecture, closed/API-only via Alibaba Cloud/DashScope -- all confirmed. SWE-bench Verified 69.6 and Tau2-Bench 74.8 confirmed verbatim via direct fetch of the cited alibabacloud.com blog. SuperGPQA 81.4 confirmed verbatim via direct fetch of the cited dev.to article. Pricing ($1.2/$6 per M, 0-32K tier) confirmed exactly via Alibaba Cloud Model Studio official pricing page. No changes made.
